drinfeld_interpretation.meaning: The full 985-relation half-braiding equations have been solved over the 297 closed-loop unknowns. This certifies the Grothendieck-level Drinfeld center dimension and cuts the closed-loop center skeleton to the 39 compatible half-braiding degrees.

failed_local_attempts.result: timed out during full algebra/idempotent materialization; no certificate emitted
timed out during half-braiding algebra materialization; no certificate emitted

half_braiding_solve.equation: For every simple relation alpha:i->j, solve z_i * alpha = alpha * z_j with z_i in Hom(i,i).

remaining_for_full_modular_data: materialize or stream the 39-dimensional half-braiding nullspace basis, not only its rank/nullity certificate
transport multiplication onto that basis and split its primitive idempotents
retain the 44,224-dimensional projection-kernel tube-module data for full tube representations
compute modular S and T matrices only after full tube modules are available
verified_claims: The tube-pair basis has 44,521 elements and surjects onto the 297-dimensional closed-loop quotient.
A deterministic section S:Loop^297 -> TubePair^44521 is certified with P S = I_297.
The closed-loop block centers split into 109 primitive idempotents before imposing half-braiding compatibility.
The complete half-braiding system over all 985 relations has rank 258 and nullity 39.
The rank/nullity pair is stable over two certified primes.
The solved 39-dimensional half-braiding space is the current certified Grothendieck-level Drinfeld boundary.
